name: Accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes that are time-consuming and error-prone.
problem_solved: Inaccurate reconciliation of supplier credit notes against outstanding invoices.
features: Basic reporting for accounts payable leads
